LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-31-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NUPORT CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE HERN DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED "IN PERSON, BY TELEPHONE, OR BY VIDEO CONFERENCE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. THE RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE AUGUST 28, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NUPORT CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The Hern declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. The response to the complaint is now due August 28, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Off Calendar
